segments.text: I'm Dr. Tejaswi calling on behalf of Tata A Life Insurance. Can I speak to Mr. Prashant Kumar?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. This is with reference to your insurance policy. We have decided to go ahead with your proposal, but as a part of the process, we need to conduct a video medical verification in which I'll ask you some verification and medical history questions, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This call will be recorded for company's audit and quality purpose. I'll be asking you a few questions regarding your insurance application, and this recorded call should take 10 to 12 minutes, sir. I hope you can continue with the call.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kindly note that the replies and the information provided by you on this call relating to our health and habits will be considered as a part of your application for insurance. And if the proposal is accepted, it shall form the basis of legal contract of insurance between you and Tata A Life Insurance, sir. Any incorrect or false statements or replies could have an impact on contract and may lead to cancellation of policy before or after issuance and may also lead to rejection of claims later, sir. You're hence requested to respond thoughtfully and correctly. Kindly confirm your full name, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I am staying in near Bangalore, Vascote. You need pin code?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Oh, sorry. Okay. I am an engineer.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Please show your government ID proof, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Can I make it back camera or front camera you want, ma'am?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You have to show through front camera, sir. There is no option of switching to back camera. Just reverse your PAN card, sir. You're showing it, you hold it reverse. No, no. You're holding in a wrong way. Just see the card once.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hold a little bit up, sir. And place it near to the camera. A little bit up.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: You want Aadhaar card or PAN card, one more any ID proof?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, no, not needed, sir. One ID proof is enough. Tell me the PAN card number, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Just make it slow, sir. I need to enter. AM-
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Sorry, sorry. AMN. N for nest.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir, C. Okay, I'll repeat, sir. AMNPG2918C. Am I correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Can you please show me a complete view of yours? Like you have to stand and show me your complete view, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, not able to see complete view. Just hold the camera and show it towards your legs and feet, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'm able to see only up to your ankle, sir. Just show it towards your feet, sir. I have to see fingers of legs and everything.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, okay. Just one second. Is it good?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Some more, sir. Up to the tips I have not seen.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Pin code not needed, sir. Just the city name is needed.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Your verification questions were done, sir. We'll move ahead with the lifestyle and the medical history questions, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In the last 24 months, have you smoked or used any tobacco or nicotine product, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever been advised by a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol consumption?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever used recreational drugs or narcotics that was not prescribed by a licensed physician?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever been diagnosed with or investigated for or had been or currently under treatment for any of the following? If yes, please provide the details. High or low blood pressure, raised cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, actually I have a sugar. I have mentioned in the form also.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay, sir. I'm not asking about diabetes, sir. You're having any high or low BP or high cholesterol or triglycerides or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, I don't have anything.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Chest pain or heaviness or discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath or any other heart conditions?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer or carcinoma in situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukemia and large nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumors, polyps, nodules, cysts, lumps or any other growths?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes, raised blood sugar or sugar in urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, other thyroid disorders or any other endocrine disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Only I have sugar, other than that nothing is there.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay, sir. I'll ask few questions regarding your diabetes, sir. Please answer accordingly. Are you on treatment prescribed by your doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. You're using insulin injection or medication?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'm not using insulin, I'm using only tablets.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: How long have you had diabetes, sir? Since how many years you're having diabetes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you on regular follow-up with doctor at least once in three months?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you had an HBA1C blood test in the last, uh, test done in the last six months?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am. I have not done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. You have not done HBA1C blood test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. Have you ever suffered from any complication such as diabetic coma, heart disease, stroke, kidney impairment, circulation problem, vascular disease, gangrene, eye or vision problems, protein in urine because of this high sugar?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: We'll move on to the next question, sir. Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease or any other respiratory disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other diseases or disorders of the liver?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus or any other diseases or disorders of blood or autoimmune disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limb, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological nervous mental health disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease, stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis or pancreatic disorder or any other gastrointestinal diseases or disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Kidney stones, gallstones, kidney or urinary tract infection, bladder or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hydrocele or any other disorders of kidney, bladder, genital, prostate or urinary system?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Recurrent back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophy, deformities, physical disability or any other disorders of muscle, bone, joint, limbs or spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Blindness, cataract, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other diseases or disorders of eyes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. You're not having eyesight also, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. Deafness, impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge or any other diseases or disorders of ear, nose or throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Is there anything else that you'd like to share with us with respect to your health or habits or anything else that you believe is important to ensure that policy is processed basis all facts and information, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, actually all the things I have truly mentioned what I have. Nothing is there other than that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir. Okay, sir. No any other than diabetes any health conditions to mention or you're having any habits like smoking, tobacco chewing? Nothing, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Other than what you have already told us, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following within the last five years? Any abnormal medical findings or pending test results, scheduled or planned or prescribed medical test such as imaging scan reports, like X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, CT scan, biopsy, ECG, treadmill, endoscopy or colonoscopy, blood or urine test. Have you undergone any of these tests and was there any abnormal finding, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am. I have not took any like these type of tests. Only I have done the sugar level test before and after.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir. But not with any of these tests?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, okay, sir. Medication or treatment that lasted more than two weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment, consultation or investigations?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: In last 15 days I not went to the hospital.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir. In the last two years?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, sir, any medication or treatment that you have used for more than two weeks?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, no, no. I have not been. No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Inability to perform your daily activities or absent from work more than two consecutive weeks at a time?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. Have you suffered from any congenital defect or disorder or hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you or your partner been told to undergo tests or treatment or received any medical advice or counseling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases including HIV and AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Apart from what you have disclosed or experiencing any unexplained weight loss or gain or any signs or symptoms that you're likely to seek medical advice or treatment for or awaiting any surgical procedure, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please confirm the medical disclosure in the Talik or previous policy with Talik. Here are some details on my screen that you have given during filling the form for the insurance application.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It shows you're having diabetes mellitus, sir. Will you agree with this condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. You hereby declare and agree that the particulars and answers to the above questions are complete and true, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, sir. And it forms a part of your policy record, sir. Thank you so much for your information and cooperation. Thank you. Your video medical verification is done, sir. I'm ending the call. Thank you.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Can I close it or from your end it will close?
segments.speaker: customer
